creator: paul.g.webster@googlemail.com
text:
# TOTALLY IGNORES _fib, the rest is fine

# PPP Config
ppp_enable="YES"
ppp_profile="bt1 bt2"
## BT1
ppp_bt1_mode="ddial"
ppp_bt1_unit=1
ppp_bt1_fib=1
ppp_bt1_nice="-20"
## BT2
ppp_bt2_mode="ddial"
ppp_bt2_unit=2
ppp_bt2_fib=2
ppp_bt2_nice="-20" sda


totally ignores _fib
